'''jadocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oedometry|oedometry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-d-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oedometry|oedometry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jadocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jædecheth|jædecheth]] || [[word:jædechej|jædechej]] || [[word:jædechesh|jædechesh]] || [[word:jædeche|jædeche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jadodochoth|jadodochoth]] || [[word:jadodochoj|jadodochoj]] || [[word:jadodochosh|jadodochosh]] || [[word:jadodocho|jadodocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jadochoth|jadochoth]] || [[word:jadochoj|jadochoj]] || [[word:jadochosh|jadochosh]] || [[word:jadocho|jadocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jadofchoth|jadofchoth]] || [[word:jadofchoj|jadofchoj]] || [[word:jadofchosh|jadofchosh]] || [[word:jadofchof|jadofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jadochotho|jadochotho]] || [[word:jadochojo|jadochojo]] || [[word:jadochosho|jadochosho]] || [[word:jadochoko|jadochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jadochoth|jadochoth]] || [[word:jadochoj|jadochoj]] || [[word:jadochosh|jadochosh]] || [[word:jadocho|jadocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jadochothol|jadochothol]] || [[word:jadochojol|jadochojol]] || [[word:jadochoshol|jadochoshol]] || [[word:jadochokol|jadochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jadochothotho|jadochothotho]] || [[word:jadochojojo|jadochojojo]] || [[word:jadochoshosho|jadochoshosho]] || [[word:jadochoko|jadochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jadochothon|jadochothon]] || [[word:jadochojon|jadochojon]] || [[word:jadochoshon|jadochoshon]] || [[word:jadochokon|jadochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jadochothoro|jadochothoro]] || [[word:jadochojoro|jadochojoro]] || [[word:jadochoshoro|jadochoshoro]] || [[word:jadochokoro|jadochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
